app.name: interlüde
app.tagline: Your layover is a story waiting to happen.

browse.noTravelersDesc: You're one of the first here. Share Interlüde!
browse.noLayoverDesc: Enter your flight details to find travelers.

reminders.title: Stay on track
reminders.whenRemind: When should we remind you to head back?

visa.freeDesc: Your passport doesn't require a visa.
visa.arrivalDesc: Factor in 30-60 minutes at the counter.
visa.requiredDesc: You won't be able to leave the airport.

welcome.slide1Title: Turn your layover into a story
welcome.slide1Desc: Find travelers at your airport whose layover actually overlaps with yours.
welcome.slide2Desc: Get curated outing suggestions based on exactly how much time you have.
welcome.slide3Desc: Smart return reminders and live gate alerts keep your whole group on track.
welcome.slide4Desc: You set your vibe. Meet people, explore solo, or just enjoy the city your way.
welcome.slide5Desc: Available in 15 languages including Yoruba, Igbo, Twi, Swahili, Arabic, Hindi and more.
welcome.slide6Desc: We tell you exactly if you need a visa to leave the airport, how much it costs and how to apply.

airport.outfitStorm: Stay indoors if possible — waterproof jacket and boots essential
airport.outfitSnow: Heavy winter gear — coat, gloves, scarf and waterproof boots
airport.outfitRain: Waterproof jacket and closed shoes — leave the white ones behind!
airport.outfitFog: Light layers and comfortable shoes for exploring
airport.outfitHot: Minimal light clothing — breathable fabrics only
airport.outfitWarm: Light clothing — shorts, t-shirt and breathable shoes
airport.outfitMild: Casual wear — jeans and a light top is perfect
airport.outfitCool: Layer up — bring a light to medium jacket
airport.outfitCold: Warm layers — jacket, jeans and closed shoes essential
airport.outfitFreeze: Winter coat, warm layers, scarf and warm shoes
airport.outfitArctic: Full winter gear — heavy coat, boots, gloves and hat non-negotiable
